title: Yijing Hexagram 21: Shi He (Biting Through)
description: Hexagram 21 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 21 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Biting Through has success. It is favorable to let justice be administered. Thunder and lightning.
